graphNodes.label: armors.json
graphNodes.description: Array of 172 armor set definitions. Each armor has a name, sharedPart (upgrade level, stat bonuses, perk, perk amount), and parts (Helmet/Chestplate/Leggings with descriptions). Covers full stat system: element boosts (fire/water/earth/air/holy/hex), defenses, dexterity/physical/magic/summon boosts, speed/jump/attack speed, protection, warding, tenacity, and elemental resistances.

graphNodes.label: blades.json
graphNodes.description: Array of 106 blade weapon definitions spanning tiers 1-5. Each blade has name, tier, attackSpeed, damage stats (type weights and scaling coefficients for physical/magic/elemental), optional perks array, and bladeType (Small/Medium/Heavy Blade, Hammer Head). Core offensive equipment component for weapon assembly.

graphNodes.label: enchantments.json
graphNodes.description: Array of 51 enchantment definitions split into two categories: unAscended (25 entries, base game) and Ascended (26 entries, endgame). Each enchantment has name, category, stacking behavior (exclusive/multi), stat modifiers (multiplier/addition types), optional effects array, and additional notes. Applies stat multipliers, flat bonuses, and special effects to equipment.

graphNodes.label: essences.json
graphNodes.description: Array of 105 essence definitions spanning tiers 1-5. Essences mirror blade stats (scaling coefficients, type weights, boosts, perks) but are used for weapon enchanting/upgrading rather than as primary weapon components. Same stat system as blades with essenceType field.

graphNodes.label: gloves.json
graphNodes.description: Array of 22 glove/shield weapon definitions spanning tiers 1-4. Each glove has name, tier, attackSpeed, stat bonuses, perks array, and gloveType (Gloves or Shield). Gloves provide unique offensive/defensive capabilities distinct from blade-based weapons.

graphNodes.label: guilds.json
graphNodes.description: Array of 9 guild definitions (Gladiator, Cursed, Cleric, Scholar, Knight, Thief, Draconic, Monk, Vampire). Each guild has a name and 3 ranks with escalating stat bonuses and perk amounts. Guilds provide passive stat bonuses and unique perks at each rank level.

graphNodes.label: handles.json
graphNodes.description: Array of 103 handle definitions spanning tiers 1-5. Handles are the second component in weapon assembly (paired with blades). Each handle has name, tier, attackSpeed, stat bonuses/perks, and handleType (Medium Handle, Long Handle, Pole). Handles often add unique perks and define weapon style.

graphNodes.label: perks.json
graphNodes.description: Array of 365 perk definitions. Perks are special abilities granted by equipment, guilds, and races. Each perk has name, description, and tags array classifying its type (Offensive/Defensive/Mobility/Magic/etc.), source (Weapon/Armor/Rune/Rune Activated/Spirit/Monk), and behavior (Buff/Debuff/Finisher/Bleed Potency/Poison Potency/Burn Potency/etc.). Central reference data for all equipment perks.

graphNodes.label: races.json
graphNodes.description: Array of 10 race definitions (Human, Half-Ork, Elf, Dark Elf, Dragon Blooded, Ork, High Elf, Arborian, Kitsune, Bunikin). Each race has name, passive ability description, and optional stat/cooldown modifiers. Races provide unique passive bonuses that affect gameplay mechanics.

graphNodes.label: rings.json
graphNodes.description: Array of 34 ring accessory definitions. Each ring has name, description, upgrade level, stat bonuses, perkName, and perkAmount. Rings are equipment accessories that provide stat bonuses and unique perks. Fixed upgrade level of 0.

graphNodes.label: runes.json
graphNodes.description: Array of 41 rune ability definitions. Each rune has name, description, upgrade level, stat bonuses, cooldown timer, and optional perkName/perkAmount. Runes are activatable abilities with cooldowns that provide combat skills, summons, mounts, and utility effects.
